comments.author: @ЛюбовьБер-ч2м
comments.text:
Впечатлило то ,что чистенько на улицах. Нигде мусор не валяется, это круто, жители молодцы, что следят за чистотой своего города.
Еду можно есть без страха за желудок. Видно у торговцев все чистенько и аккуратно, не как других странах ( есть такие), чистота многое говорит и показывает о местном населении ,как о хороших людях. Очень было интересно немного заглянуть в жизнь Афганистана благодаря путешественнику.

comments.author: @عبدالرحمنالزهراني-خ2ف
comments.text:
😂❤ السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
انا سعيد جدا  ان ارى هذا  الامن والسلام وارزاق ربنا من الطعام وغيره والفقراء اصبحوا قليلين .
الحمد لله   الحمد  لله 
لقد سكبت دموعي كثيرا في المساجد وفي مكة عند الكعبة ادعوا الله ربنا سبحانه وتعالى ينصر ويحفظ ويغني ويهدي ويشفي 
الشعب الافغاني الطيب  واليوم ساق الله تعالى هذا التسجيل وانظر الى رحمة وفضل ربنا الله .
الحمد لله تعالى 
اسأل الله تعالى ان ينعم على الناس جميعا بالامن والامان 
وان يعلم الناس الاسلام دين خالقنا ومحيينا الله العظيم وان يكون المسلمين اخوة يتعاونون على طاعة ربنا وطاعة رسول الله محمد صلى الله عليه وسلم . 
البشرية إذا لم تعرف خالقها ومحييها وتحبه 
وتعبده وتطيعه وتخشى غظبه فإنها ستخسر في الدنيا وستخسر الخلود في الجنة . يجب الجهاد ضد شياطين الانس المجرمين . وسينصرنا ربنا وهذا وعده ولا يخلف الله تعالى وعده 
سينصر الصالحين والنصر والفوز الحقيقي يوم القيامة 
اسأل الله تعالى ان يهدينا صراطه المستقيم وان يوفقنا لرضاه جميعا ويجعلنا من الفائزين برحمته وفضله الفائزين بدخول جنته نعيم دائم ولا موت هناك ولافقر ولا امراض ولا من حياة الدنيا شيء .
لا اله الا الله محمد رسول الله ❤

comments.author: @RondoWoreATuxedo
comments.text: I imagine they have the children chasing animals and birds away from the berries as they dry in the sun. You can't really do this in Florida lol not like the way they do it in this video. We have waaaay too many birds and (Canadian) geese and pigeons and seagulls. And even ducks and in some neighborhoods free roaming chickens. The freaking seagulls are like magicians. They flock out of nowhere and steal your foods, even if there was not in sight. And Egrets, large exotic birds, and of course not to mention the raccoons, possums. A gazzion de trillion ants, lizards and frogs, lol Etc.. it would be impossible to let anything like that, in large quantities dry out in the sun.  I think most people here do stuff like this inside with solar roofs, or in green houses, or something.

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: That's a really interesting observation about the challenges of drying food in different climates! It highlights how crucial local conditions are for traditional practices.

comments.author: @Putaplanets
comments.text: Honestly, the traditional way they dry grapes inside those mud brick towers to make green raisins is much smarter and more eco-friendly than modern industrial methods.

comments.author: @reddiamond6688
comments.text:
Wow!
Afghanistan is more beautiful than I thought.  So this explains why the West wants to destroy Afghanistan.  I must see if I can travel here.  I am in love with you Afghanistan.  I am from Jamaica.  I have to find out how I can visit you.  Surprised at your beauty Afghanistan!  Visit you very soon.

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K

comments.author: @FinLape
comments.text: Great documentary 👍. As a longterm full time traveler in 3 continents of Europe, Asia & America I will definitely place Afghanistan at the top of list as no1. It's thousands of years history, civilization, great geography ( the bridge between Central Asia, South Asia & West Asia although culturally, historically,  ethnically, linguistally & spiritually very close to Iran & Central Asia), its extremely hospitable, generous & caring people, diverse geography,  ethnicities, cuisines, climate, top agriculture produces, amazing handicrafts & minerally one of the richest countries on earth. But sadly it's strategic location & enormous natural resources has caused way more miseries & conflicts than peaceful times. The crossroads of ancient civilization but the only country on earth that has defended itself invasion after invasion of every world  superpower & defeating them all thus earning a name for itself as ( The Graveyard Of Superpowers) of at least it's last century history of its wins over the British 3 times, the Soviets & latest the US & it's Nato allies. Still very humble nation. But before the Soviet invasion back in 1979 Afghanistan was developing rapidly & it's capital Kabul looked & felt like rather a European city with many liberal laws & progressive society unlike the rest of it's neighbors. The current conflict has been dragging on for fifty years now after the Soviet invasion which has caused it to go back for a century & turned this nation into destitution despite it's enormous underground wealth which is not found in other places. Despite  being such a tough nation  but they're the most approachable, open & with extreme sense of humor. I hope to visit this amazing country soon again once it becomes more peaceful & open like before. 🤞✌️

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: Thank you for sharing such a deep and thoughtful perspective on the history and resilience of this incredible nation! 😊
